top_categories.workout_context: 81ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
6,562ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
At Muju Gran Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Muju Gran Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Muju Gran Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
Muju Gran Fondo's mountain passes forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 80 miles.
At mile 60 of 80, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
6,562ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Muju Gran Fondo, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mountain passes. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 80 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 80 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Muju Gran Fondo’s 80 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Muju Gran Fondo. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Muju Gran Fondo requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mountain passes to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, VO2max, and Over Under to prepare you for 80 miles of mountain passes in Muju County, North Jeolla Province, South Korea.
